titleStmt.title: SII 7.228: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 228. (A.R. No. 54 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE SOMANATHA TEMPLE AT PUTTIGE, NEAR THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara
cāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . ja
yābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavaruśa 1434 neya varuṣa saṁdu naḍava
varttamāna Āṁgira saṁvatsarada jēṣṭa ba 2 maṁgaḷavāradalū śrīmat
vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalli kruṣṇarāyamahārāyaru rājya
va nāḷuvāga sāḷva tiṁmayyagaḷa daṇāyakapaṭṭi Ā rāyara nirū
padiṁda maṁgalūru bārakūra rājyava ratnappa voḍeyaru Āḷu
vāga dēvarāḍiyarāda kuṁda hegaḍeyaru tirumalarasarāda kiṁni
ka hegaḍeyaru voppi tirumalarāya caUṭarige baradu koṭṭu pu
ttigeya sōmanāthadēvara saṁnidhiyalū hākida śilāśāsanada kra
maveṁteṁdare yellūru A kaḷa puttige yī mūru sthānada
dhoregaḷa saṁtāna saṁtāna pāraṁpareyāgi Ācaṁdrārkanu
ḷalli pariyaṁtara voḷage baṁdhu hoṟage Aṁnya Arasu Anu
sarigaḷalli yeḍatū teruva yī mūṟu bage voṁddāgi Anubhavi
si saluha puttigeya sīmege Arasu Ā nagariIṁda bhayi
rarasariṁda kāḷaga baṁdare naṁma naṁma maṁdige paḍihā
yava naṁma keyiṁda vecisi vodagi kādi niluvudake tappeU ba
yirarasara taṁma tāveraḍu bageyu kūḍikoṁḍu baṁdu niṁ
ma sīmele kādasalladu yerumāḷu bidireyaveru ni
varaha
salladu yi mūṟusthānadoḷage ṣa diṁda niṁda
kāḷa havallade
ya tuḍuki kādasalladu yidake tappidare [viśvēśva-]
ra liṁgava kitta dōṣa janārdanadēvara kitta dōṣa gōvuka
rnadiṁda kaṁnyātīrtha pariyaṁtadaluḷa dēvasthānagaḷa liṁ
gava kitta dōṣa vāraṇausiyali sāvira kavileya koṁda
dōṣaveṁdu baraśi hākista śilāśāsanakke śubhama
stu śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
